payload.content: If the hop-1 retrieved titles already cover every named entity in the question, pick the most specific descriptive phrase (a date range, a relationship, a location, a property) as the hop-2 query anchor. Do not emit a query that is just the question reworded.

rationale: Mirror of HoVer ech_distinct_anchor. Tests fallback-to-descriptive-phrase strategy on bridge questions where all named entities are already grounded by hop 1.
